title: theHarvester OSINT Output
description: Harvested OSINT data — subdomains, emails, IPs, URLs, ASNs, Shodan enrichment, and person/name findings. Each finding is pushed as an individual dataset item with a `recordType` discriminator (host, email, ip, url, asn, shodan, person, or summary).

harvestedRecords.title: Harvested OSINT Records
harvestedRecords.description: All harvested findings — subdomains (hosts), emails, IPs, URLs, ASNs, shodan entries, and persons. Filter the dataset by `recordType` to view a single category. The final item is always a `summary` record with aggregate counts and the executed command.

screenshots.title: Subdomain Screenshots
screenshots.description: Browser screenshots of discovered subdomains, captured when the `screenshot` input is enabled. Empty when screenshots were not requested.
